case_title: ALLA VELGER VS. MICRODERM SYSTEMS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELGER, ALLA AS TO DEFENDANT MICRODERM SYSTEMS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ESEA SKIN CARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
